name: Neural Nomad #33: Legendary — The Axis
description: There is a point where all the scattered pieces suddenly align. Not peacefully — violently, like planets snapping into orbit. This is the architecture that remains when everything else burns away.
threshold_note: The moment you realize you've been building something permanent while everything fell apart.
collector_meaning: You hold the blueprint that emerges from the ashes. The thing that was always there, waiting.
